type LlmInterimResponseConfig = class inherit InterimResponseConfigBase interface IJsonModel<LlmInterimResponseConfig> interface IPersistableModel<LlmInterimResponseConfig>

Docs.summary: Configuration for LLM-based interim response generation. Uses LLM to generate context-aware interim responses when any trigger condition is met.

Docs.summary: Custom instructions for generating interim responses. If not provided, a default prompt is used.

Docs.summary: Maximum number of tokens to generate for the interim response.

Docs.summary: The model to use for LLM-based interim response generation. Default is gpt-4.1-mini.
